base_url.description: Vercel API base URL override for tests or proxies.

access_token.description: Vercel API bearer access token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

start_date.description: Optional RFC3339 lower-bound value sent verbatim as the 'from' query param when set; omitted entirely when unset (legacy: vercel.go:72-74 only calls q.Set when trimmed non-empty). Not a stateful incremental cursor - legacy never persists or advances this value across reads.
